headline: Assessing Sysco (SYY) Valuation After Recent Share Stability And Modest Momentum
summary: What Sysco’s Recent Share Move Means For Investors Sysco (SYY) shares have been relatively steady over the past week, with a 1 day return of 2.6% and a 7 day gain of 4.1%. This has drawn fresh attention to the stock’s recent pullback over the past month. See our latest analysis for Sysco. The recent 1 day share price return of 2.6% and 7 day share price return of 4.1% come after a 30 day share price return decline of 11.3%, while the year to date share price return of 3.5% and 1 year total...
